title: viola odorata var. dumetorum
intro: Viola odorata var. dumetorum, also known as the woodland violet, is a variant of the sweet violet (Viola odorata) plant, characterized by its small, fragrant flowers and heart-shaped leaves. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Viola odorata var. dumetorum include its ability to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and improve sleep quality due to its calming effects. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues.
